CUTTING PARAMETER.Product/Process Specification/Tolerance: As per Laser Cutting Work Instruction Manual :
CUTTING PARAMETER.Evaluation/Measurement Technique: Visual from Parameter Setting Panel Screen
CUTTING PARAMETER.Control Method:
1.Record in in-process register/ in-process inspection report/Process SOP
2.Laser Callibration - Do callibration before start cutting on daily basis.
3.Laser cutting machine preventive maintenance as per PM plan.
4.Use of approved DXF program as per current revision level.
CUTTING PARAMETER.Reaction Plan: Put rework/rejection tag, store in identified rework/rejection area and inform to production supervisor
